content: Two established SVG text-wrapping strategies: (1) canvas 2D measureText() word-width measurement + manual greedy line-splitting + one <tspan> per line with dy line-height offsets — broad support, but Safari has known bugs with dy positioning on tspan in some versions; (2) SVG foreignObject containing an HTML div with CSS white-space/word-wrap — lets the browser's native text layout engine wrap, simpler code, but foreignObject has historically had gaps in old IE (irrelevant for this project) and requires careful width sizing since the div's layout is independent of the SVG viewport in some edge cases.
